title: BarkinMad Coins in ZXSpace
description: Earn BarkinMad Coins while playing ZXSpace and unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.
summary: BarkinMad Coins reward your progress in ZXSpace and unlock cosmetic rewards throughout the ZX Series.
heroImageAlt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series rewards

images.caption: Earn and spend BarkinMad Coins across the ZX Series.

sections.heading: What Are BarkinMad Coins?
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are the shared reward system used across supported ZX Series games.
As you play ZXSpace, you'll earn coins that can be used to unlock cosmetic rewards across the wider ZX Series.

sections.heading: Earn Coins Through Gameplay
paragraphs: Complete waves to earn BarkinMad Coins and build your shared ZX Series wallet. Coins are awarded separately from your score, giving you another way to track your progress.
Every completed game helps you earn more coins, encouraging you to improve your skills and keep defending your cities.

sections.heading: Unlock Cannon Skins
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins can be used to unlock cosmetic cannon skins, allowing you to personalise your game without affecting gameplay balance.
Available skins include Classic, Red, Neon, Cyanic, Golden, and Obsidian.

faq.question: Do BarkinMad Coins have any real-world value?
faq.answer: No. BarkinMad Coins are an in-game reward used to unlock cosmetic content across supported ZX Series games. They have no cash value and cannot be exchanged for real money.

featureShowcases.heading: Play, Earn, Unlock
featureShowcases.summary: BarkinMad Coins reward regular play and unlock cosmetic cannon skins across the ZX Series.
body: Every game of ZXSpace helps you earn BarkinMad Coins, giving you another reason to improve your skills, defend your cities, and keep progressing through the game.
Combined with achievements and leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins create a shared progression system that connects every supported ZX Series game.

image.caption: Every completed wave brings you closer to your next unlock.
